creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Current version of port can't be installed due to checksum mismatch. Not sure who is at fault, but I don't see version 3.34 being listed on CPAN page[1].

Attached diff updates the port to 3.44.

References:
[1] http://search.cpan.org/~sri/Mojolicious-3.44/

Thanks

How-To-Repeat: Try to install it from ports.
